summary: Full testing of reservation system - backend APIs and mobile app UI. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Full end-to-end reservation flow verified on mobile UI. Business panel login and Rezervacije page verified.
critical_code_review_comments: index.tsx tab label for 'rezervacije' uses t('tabs', 'events') - but this correctly resolves to 'Rezervacije' in Bosnian (bs) and 'Events' in English. Might want to rename translation key to t('tabs', 'reservations') for clarity.
ReservationsTab.tsx: API variable uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL) which is correct for Expo.
server.py is 1801 lines - exceeds 700-line recommendation but works correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test reservations created during testing: TEST_VerifyUser, TEST_CodeCheck, TEST_MyResUser, TEST_BusinessConfirm, TEST_Unverified, Test Tester, Test User Final - these are in the reservations collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reservation system fully implemented and tested. Backend: GET /api/reservations/locations (filters restaurant/cafe/prenociste), POST /api/reservations (returns 6-digit code), POST /api/reservations/verify (verifies code), GET /api/my-reservations?phone=xxx. Mobile: ReservationsTab correctly opened by 'rezervacije' tab, category filters work, full form->code->verify->success flow works. Business panel: /api/business-panel/ login works (starigrad@test.ba / Test1234!), Rezervacije sidebar link navigates to /api/business-panel/rezervacije which shows reservations.
